_readme: Master MCP server registry. Set enabled:true and install each server before activating. Install instructions in each server's config file.
_zed_note: To activate in Zed: add to ~/.config/zed/settings.json under context_servers. See architecture/05_technology/MCP_ARCHITECTURE.md

biomcp.description: Unified biomedical access — ClinicalTrials, PubMed, genes, variants, drugs, diseases, pathways

pubmed.description: PubMed — 36M+ citations, MeSH search, full text via PMC, citations/references
pubmed.install: git clone https://github.com/Augmented-Nature/PubMed-MCP-Server ~/.mcp-servers/pubmed && cd ~/.mcp-servers/pubmed && npm install && npm run build

uniprot.description: UniProt — protein sequences, domains, variants, pathways, interactions, 3D structures (PDB)
uniprot.install: git clone https://github.com/augmented-nature/uniprot-mcp-server ~/.mcp-servers/uniprot && cd ~/.mcp-servers/uniprot && npm install && npm run build

chembl.description: ChEMBL — drug discovery, bioactivity assays, ADMET properties, mechanisms of action, similarity search
chembl.install: git clone https://github.com/augmented-nature/chembl-mcp-server ~/.mcp-servers/chembl && cd ~/.mcp-servers/chembl && npm install && npm run build

ncbi.description: NCBI Datasets — genomes, genes, taxonomy, sequences (31 tools)
ncbi.install: git clone https://github.com/Augmented-Nature/NCBI-Datasets-MCP-Server ~/.mcp-servers/ncbi && cd ~/.mcp-servers/ncbi && npm install && npm run build

biothings.description: BioThings.io — MyGene (22M+ genes across 22K species) + MyVariant (400M+ human variants)
biothings.install: git clone https://github.com/Augmented-Nature/BioThings-MCP-Server ~/.mcp-servers/biothings && cd ~/.mcp-servers/biothings && npm install && npm run build

bioontology.description: BioOntology / BioPortal — 1,200+ biological ontologies, term search, text annotation, ontology recommendations
bioontology.install: git clone https://github.com/augmented-nature/bioontology-mcp-server ~/.mcp-servers/bioontology && cd ~/.mcp-servers/bioontology && npm install && npm run build

qdrant.description: Qdrant vector database — semantic memory, embedding search, RAG retrieval
qdrant.install: pip install uv  (uvx handles the rest automatically)
qdrant.local_mode_note: No Docker needed — set QDRANT_LOCAL_PATH for fully local file-based mode

neo4j.description: Neo4j graph database — knowledge graph storage, Cypher queries, schema exploration
neo4j.install: Download binary from https://github.com/neo4j/mcp/releases and place in PATH
neo4j.database_install: Docker: docker run -p 7474:7474 -p 7687:7687 -e NEO4J_AUTH=neo4j/yourpassword -e NEO4J_PLUGINS='["apoc"]' neo4j

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph memory — entities, relations and observations that survive across agent sessions

filesystem.description: Local filesystem access — lets agents read and write research files directly

github.description: GitHub integration — repos, issues, PRs, code search
github.install: Already active via Zed mcp-server-github extension

sequential_thinking.description: Structured multi-step reasoning for complex research problems
sequential_thinking.install: Already active via Zed mcp-server-sequential-thinking extension

embedding.description: PDF/MD → heading-aware chunks → Ollama embed → Qdrant. 7 tools: vectorize_document, vectorize_text, search, search_between, list_collections, collection_info, drop_collection.

rss_reader.description: RSS/Atom/JSON Feed reader with Google Reader API model. 19 tools for subscription, folder management, unread tracking, cross-feed search.

logseq.description: Logseq knowledge graph CRUD. 8 tools: get/create/update/delete page, list_pages, search, get_backlinks, get_block. Graph path: knowledge/logseq/

brave_search.description: Brave Search — privacy-respecting live web search for AI agents. 2 tools: web_search, local_search. Free tier: 2,000 queries/month.
brave_search.install: No install needed — npx runs it automatically
